name: Tofu and Cheese-Stuffed Shells
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup Mozzarella Cheese, Part Skim Milk, Shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions; drain and rinse with cold water.
2. Drain the cooked pasta and set aside.
3. In a small saucepan, cook carrot and green onion in a small amount of water until tender; drain.
4. For filling, mash tofu in a medium mixing bowl. Stir in the drained carrot mixture, ricotta cheese, cheddar cheese, 1/4 cup of mozzarella cheese, egg white, salt, and pepper.
5. For sauce, combine undrained tomatoes, tomato paste, basil, oregano, sugar, garlic powder, and fennel seed (if desired) in a medium saucepan. Bring to boil, reduce heat, and simmer uncovered for 10 minutes.
6. Stuff each cooked pasta shell with about 1 rounded tablespoon of the filling.
7. Place shells in an ungreased 2-quart square baking dish. Pour sauce over the shells.
8. Cover and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 25 minutes or until heated through. Sprinkle with remaining mozzarella cheese. If desired, serve with Parmesan cheese.
9. Makes 4 servings.
